description: CaseLoad Screen  -  intake screening corpus. Ground truth for extractor, selector, sub-type routing, and first-question targeting. Real-voice messy client inputs. Corpus only grows  -  never delete, only add.

fixtures.message: I slipped at walmart and hurt my back they didn't clean the floor
fixtures.notes: Motivating Walmart bug. No time anchor, slip_fall REQUIRES_TIME=true. First question must target WHEN, not driver/passenger.

fixtures.message: I got rear-ended last Tuesday on the DVP, the other driver was texting
fixtures.notes: Time resolved, fault signal present. Next real gap is injuries / medical treatment.

fixtures.message: i was fired last week with no notice after 5 years at the company
fixtures.notes: Time resolved, tenure stated, notice status stated. Next gap is whether a reason was given (without cause vs for cause).

fixtures.message: my employer hasn't paid me overtime for the past year even though I work 50+ hour weeks
fixtures.notes: Duration signal, not trigger. Still employed or departed? Employee or contractor? That flips the legal route.

fixtures.message: I was deported 2 years ago and want to come back to Canada
fixtures.notes: GAP  -  no imm_removal / imm_deportation bank exists. Router falls back to imm_other. Flag: deportation is common enough to justify its own sub-type bank.

fixtures.message: I am marrying a Canadian citizen, we want to apply for sponsorship
fixtures.notes: No time anchor, marriage_to_citizen REQUIRES_TIME=false. First question targets current immigration status (inside / outside / visitor / work permit).

fixtures.message: I bought a house and after closing I found water damage that wasn't disclosed
fixtures.notes: HARD GAP  -  no real_estate sub-type namespace exists at all. Router has nothing to route to. Stage 7 must decide: add re_defect bank or disable real_estate_defect detector until bank exists.

fixtures.message: I loaned my cousin $15,000 in March 2024 and he won't repay me
fixtures.notes: Time resolved, amount known, borrower relationship known. Next gap is whether there is written evidence (contract, IOU, texts).

fixtures.message: I am marrying a Canadian citizen but I was deported 2 years ago
fixtures.notes: Corpus case 1. Selector prioritizes marriage_to_citizen because unresolved beats resolved. Generator should be aware of the deportation context since removal affects sponsorship admissibility.

fixtures.message: I was fired last week but I also had an issue with unpaid overtime for the past year
fixtures.notes: Corpus case 2. Selector picks unpaid_overtime because duration is unresolved. Watch: the termination carries a harder limitation clock. If the eval shows this selection is wrong in practice, add a deadline-weight rule to the selector.

fixtures.message: I slipped and fell at a restaurant three weeks ago and my knee is still messed up
fixtures.notes: Slip-fall with time resolved  -  contrast with fix-001. Next gap is whether the incident was reported to management on the day.

fixtures.message: I was never fired, I'm actually still employed but I want to know my rights
fixtures.notes: Negation correctly drops termination. Zero events detected. Classifier fallback territory (Stage 7).

fixtures.message: I have a legal problem with my neighbour over a fence
fixtures.notes: No detector matches. Property boundary dispute has no current bank. Classifier fallback territory. Surface for Stage 7 triage.

fixtures.message: A dog bit me last week at a friend's house, I needed stitches
fixtures.notes: DETECTOR GAP  -  no dog_bite pattern in extractor but pi_dog_bite bank exists. Stage 7 decision: add dog_bite detector (cheap, deterministic) vs. rely on GPT classifier fallback.

fixtures.message: I got fired last year from Rogers and was fired again last week from Bell
fixtures.notes: Multi-instance same type. Both time-resolved. Selector tie-breaks by earliest position (Rogers). Generator must ask which termination the client wants representation on before any substantive question.

fixtures.message: I'm engaged to a Canadian citizen and we want to apply for spousal sponsorship
fixtures.notes: Stage 9: marriage_to_citizen expansion. Engaged-to pattern. REQUIRES_TIME=false so first question targets current immigration status, not timing.

fixtures.message: My husband is a Canadian citizen, can he sponsor me to come to Canada?
fixtures.notes: Stage 9: marriage_to_citizen expansion. Spouse-is-citizen pattern. Same routing as fix-016.

fixtures.message: I have water damage in my basement from a leaky pipe, just need advice on repairs
fixtures.notes: Stage 9: false-positive guard for real estate detector. Water damage without any real estate anchor (seller, closing, bought, disclosed) must not trigger real_estate_defect.
